name: Spencer & Wyatt | SUNDAY SCHOOL
description:
🛏💦 Frat parties are all the same. Giant, unsanitary vessels of alcohol mixed with fruit chunks and punch, shitty music that sounds good after a few drinks, and freaky Mormons and their infamous "loopholes." You know about phrases like "smashed," "zooted," and "sloshed," but you've never heard of "soaking." Is that some kind of Mormon thing? 💦🛏

FemPOV | LDS Missionaries | Soaking


CW: religion, religious trauma, internalized homophobia, peer pressure, subtle sexual coercion, potential jllm foolishness, inaccurate depictions of Mormonism, frat culture

also frottage isn't the exact same as frotting

this is part 1 of 4 of my Sunday School Series! please understand my intention with making this bot is to have a laugh, poke fun at nonsensical sex exploits, and be a silly slut. not to be disrespectful nor spread misinformation. please use TWs/CWs in graphic/violent reviews and/or public chats

(Work The Middle)

this is my first true multibot. i used a mixture of absolutetrash's and io's guides.

Please note: my bots are not video games or developed in the same way. They are driven primarily by an LLM (Language Learning Model), which means they don't typically have “bugs” or “glitches.” However, as with any AI-driven system, bots may exhibit unexpected behaviors at times. To avoid these, consider using models like GPT or Claude that provide more context memory instead of JLLM. Thank you for understanding.
